rag_rules: Place AGREE annexes in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation scopes for bindings
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in generated AGREE code
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in valid scopes
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions and declarations
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents in type-level contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `const`, `eq`, `gua`, and `ass` for declarations in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes
Do not reference non-existent or package-qualified identifiers not in the model
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
